data.description: FORN is a one-man army systems and development studio based in Copenhagen, Denmark, focused on platforms, architecture, machine learning and web applications.
data.html:
Reach out

Systems and development
based in Copenhagen

FORN is a one-man army specialized in Systems
and
development Based in Copenhagen,

Feeding off of

grand
ambitions

To create solutions that cut through the noise.

Thoughts, ramblings and various

stories

Swipe Drag
Custom infrastructure

Platforms

There are (luckily) more options than Cloud or Chaos. I design and develop fundamentally digitally sovereign infrastructure that takes care of itself.

Reach out
Specialized networks

Machine Learning

General models see general patterns, and waste enormous overhead on abilities that are never used. I work in the intersection of data, behavior and prediction, to help future teams solve old world problems with new world tools.

Reach out
Complex interactivity

Web Apps

Web applications that do their job without making a fuss. From internal tooling to full platforms, with all the hard parts made invisible.

Reach out
Systems & design

Architecture

I build systems that shouldn't need me, and leverage experience from development, operations and business alike to create cohesion across professional boundaries.

Reach out

I excel at completely

sub
mer
ging

Myself in a single goal, almost drowning in it, and emerging with a solution that feels complete.

Enough of me; let's talk about your

vision

Get in touch your way
adrian@forn.dk +45 28 68 81 40
24 hours
Signal Github LinkedIn
Or the right way Or my way
